LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: [Target Language]\nSet which language the AI should translate foreign mods into.
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: [AI Provider]\nSelect your AI model provider. Google (Gemini) or OpenAI are highly recommended.
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: Key is empty! How can I test?
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: ✅ [Test] Success! AI core is responding well.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: ❌ [Test] Failed! Check network or API settings.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: 🌐 [Init] Reading mods, establishing global translation pool...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: 🚀 Auto Translation Core Started! Target Mods: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: ⏩ [Skip] No Languages or Defs found. Code-only mod.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DefScan: 🔍 [DefInjected] Deep scan and global matching initiated...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FoundMissing: ⚙️ [{0}] Found {1} missing lines! Requesting AI backup...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NoMissing: ✨ [{0}] All parts present, no translation needed.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Failed to fetch list, check your key.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network fluctuation or server busy. Auto-retry triggered...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MigrateSuccess: 📦 [Migration] Successfully migrated {0}'s {1} to the new architecture!
LanguageData.ATC_FinishMessage_Text:
🎉 Translation task completed successfully!
[Case A: First Time Use] Please go to the Mod list in the main menu, enable the generated "! AutoTranslation AI Pack", drag it to the [BOTTOM] of the load order, and [Restart Game]!
[Case B: Already Enabled] Go to Main Menu ＞ Language, and [Click your current language again]. The game will instantly clear the cache and load the latest strings without needing a restart!
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_FullText:
【Tutorial】
Select [Target Language] (Supports multi-language translation for CN, JP, KR, EN, RU, UA, etc.!) and [Provider]. We recommend Google (Gemini) or DeepSeek for free users!
Apply for an [API Key] and paste it. 🔥 V4.7 New Feature: Supports "Infinite API Magazine"! You can click the "+" button to add multiple API interfaces. The system will automatically cycle tasks between them to maximize your free quotas!
[Auto Model Detection] Once a key (length ＞ 10) is pasted, the system will automatically fetch available models in the background—no search button needed! Just select your model from the dropdown on the right.
Adjust [Concurrent Threads] (Recommended: Number of active interfaces x 3). Then click the green [🚀 Start Full Scan] to translate everything, or use [🎯 Single Module Scan] for a specific target! You can click [🛑 Stop Translation] at any time.
[🎉 Essential Steps After Translation] 👉 Case A (First Time): Go to the Mod list, enable the generated "! AutoTranslation AI Pack", move it to the bottom of the load order, and then [Restart Game]! 👉 Case B (Already Enabled): Go to Main Menu ＞ Language, and [Click your current language again] to instantly refresh the game strings!
【Frequently Asked Questions】 Q: Why is the game still in English after translation? A: Please check Step 5! If it's your first time, you must restart the game. If already enabled, re-selecting the language forces a refresh. This is a game engine limitation, not a bug!
Q: Why do I get HTTP 401 / 403 errors? A: Usually, this is due to an incorrect API key or your quota being exhausted. Check for extra spaces when copying, or use the "+" feature to add more keys!
Q: Why do I get an HTTP 404 error? A: If using official APIs, ensure [Custom Base URL] is "Completely Empty"! Only fill this if using a third-party proxy or local server.
Q: What if the log shows red "Timeout" or "Waiting for retry" warnings? A: This happens when API servers are busy or hitting rate limits. The mod has built-in auto-retry and key-rotation. As long as successful translations follow, just let it process in the background! (≧∀∀≦)ゞ
Q: Where are the translated files? Can I share them? A: They are in RimWorld/Mods/!Translation_AI_Pack. Please note: these generated packs are for [Personal Local Use Only]. Do not upload them to the Steam Workshop or redistribute them!
LanguageData.ATC_UpdateLog_FullText:
--- V4.7 Speedster Ultimate Update --- • World's First [Infinite API Magazine]: Set multiple API interfaces (e.g., Google + DeepSeek mix). The system uses Round-Robin load balancing to bypass rate limits and maximize free usage! • [High-Speed Thread Tuner]: No longer locked to 3 threads! Adjust up to 30 concurrent threads. Combined with multiple APIs, translation speed is limitless! • New [Auto Model Radar]: Background detection of available models after pasting a key, removing the need for manual search buttons. • [Global Scroll UI]: Solves UI clutter and log-cutting issues with a luxury fixed-height monitoring screen!
--- V4.6 Ultimate Update --- • Added [Reverse Translation] support for English, Ukrainian, and Russian. Translate Chinese mods into multiple languages! • [🎯 Targeted Scan] engine: Specify a single mod for rapid scanning and translation. • [🛑 Emergency Brake]: Interrupt the process at any time while retaining progress. • X-Ray Probe upgraded to [Level 3 Recursive Mode], digging deep into all folder structures for hidden text. • Completely rewritten UI core with dynamic height windows. • Removed unstable auto-hot-reload; uses official main menu switching for 100% improved stability!
--- V4.5 Update --- • New [Anomaly Detection Report] dual-screen monitoring dashboard. • Added [Corruption Shield] to automatically skip and protect against damaged XML files. • Added foolproof tutorial popups for first-time users.
--- V4.3 Update --- • First [Auto-Fill Translation Pipeline]: No more manual searching for missing lines. • Built-in [Global Translation Memory]: Consolidates all installed mod text to save API usage. • Custom Base URL support: Fully compatible with local LLMs (LM Studio, Ollama, etc.).
LanguageData.ATC_NoModelWaitKey: No model selected (Paste key to auto-fetch)
LanguageData.ATC_EmptyConfigWarning: Please set at least one valid API configuration!
